title: Why do Evas get their mouths bolted shut
display_title: Why do Evas get their mouths bolted shut
wikitext:
[]: Why do Evas get their mouths bolted shut?             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Sep 21, 2009 4:29 pm Why do they do that with them? I think that if an Eva gets pinned to the ground and all its limbs are pinned as well, biting would be pretty handy. In other situations it prove useful too, considering that Evas have considerable strength, they could maim an Angel with a well placed bite (even kill if it bit the core). The only reason I see why they would need to do that is that they would need to brush the Evas' teeth if they could open their mouths. So why do they bolt their mouths shut?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Mon Sep 21, 2009 4:48 pm To make them look like robots to the outside world.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Sep 21, 2009 5:00 pm So that the viewing audience is left with no question as to when an Eva is really pissed off. Edit: To get to the other side.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 5:14 pm I agree with the above statements.

[]: Re: Why do Evas get their mouths bolted shut?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 21, 2009 5:22 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Why do Evas get their mouths bolted shut?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 5:28 pm The Eva Monkey won the thread.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:14 pm There's something weirdly symbolic about the mouths being bolted shut; it's like a means of showing how much (or how little) control the humans have over the Eva. But heh, yeah, The Eva Monkey said it best. :: laughs::

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:15 pm there's that other scene, i think it's EoTV where eva eats Gendo's head. it uses the same scene as eva 01 holding kaworu. um...know what scene i mean?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 8:41 pm I disagree with having there mouths bolted shut having anything symbolic to relating to it. The mouths are bolted shut because if it wasn't it could make the Japanese public aware that the Evangelion is more than your average mecha since without bindings you'll be able to notice teeth or tounge like with the MP Evas. It's odd though when Unit-01 went Berserk for the first time it's teeth never showed when it's mouth opened but I know that bit is discussed in a thread somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:02 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: The Eva Monkey won the thread.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:44 pm A better question is why do Evas even have a mouth they dont eat anything (exception Unit 1) anyways so thats a major design flaw anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:46 pm Because human beings have mouths. Because human beings synch up to the Evas. Because human beings *like* being able to feel their mouth.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 21, 2009 11:49 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I disagree with having there mouths bolted shut having anything symbolic to relating to it. The mouths are bolted shut because if it wasn't it could make the Japanese public aware that the Evangelion is more than your average mecha since without bindings you'll be able to notice teeth or tounge like with the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 22, 2009 3:17 am UltraBlackPilot wrote: A better question is why do Evas even have a mouth they dont eat anything (exception Unit 1) anyways so that's a major design flaw anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Sep 22, 2009 12:28 pm Do you want that thing to go berserk and start eating everything in sight? No? Didn't think so.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Sep 22, 2009 10:52 pm It's just one of many restraints imposed by the armor.

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Thu Sep 24, 2009 9:01 am AuraTwilight wrote: Do you want that thing to go berserk and start eating everything in sight? No? Didn't think so.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Sep 24, 2009 3:50 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Do you want that thing to go berserk and start eating everything in sight? No? Didn't think so.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Sep 24, 2009 8:21 pm Didn't surprise either Gendo or Fuyutsuki.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Sep 25, 2009 12:15 am Fazmotron wrote: Didn't surprise either Gendo or Fuyutsuki.

The only reason I see why they would need to do that is that they would need to brush the Evas' teeth if they could open their mouths. So why do they bolt their mouths shut?
